calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; To Appoint Trustee; And Confirm Real Property Asset In Revocable Trust And Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Barry Schneider for and with Amber Chase (Proposed Trustee).

Mr. Schneider stated that there is a piece of property in San Francisco titled in the name of the Decedent as Trustee of the Trust, that all they could find is page six of the Trust, that he was told by Judge Stewart to file a Trust petition and have the Granddaughter appointed, and that they have provided a better copy of page six. The Court noted that no objections have been filed. The Court granted the Petition for Order to Confirm Validity of Trust, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; To Appoint Trustee; And Confirm Real Property Asset In Revocable Trust And Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Sep-18-2017 Continued To Oct-02-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
